contentList.content: Mystra is the second incarnation of the Goddess of Magic after her predecessor Mystryl sacrificed herself to protect the Weave from Karsus' Folly. Originally known as the wizard Midnight, she accepted the position of Goddess of Magic from Ao themselves after the conclusion of the Godswar and reluctantly took the name Mystra to smooth the transition between gods.
Crafted with fashion instead of function in mind, this dress won't even protect you from the elements. Now will It do much against a sword's thrust.

Originally born as Ariel Manx in 1332 DR, she became known as the wizard Midnight. She was only 26 when the previous Mystra died and she ascended as goddess. Subsequently “killed” in 1385 DR by Cyric and Shar, she was found by Elminster in a cabin in the woods possessing the body of a bear. It was he who restored her to godhood in 1480 DR.
Even a tadpole can't completely negate your divine intelligence.
